basic_details.job_title: AIIMS Bhopal Group A Non Faculty Recruitment 2026 - Apply Offline for Posts
basic_details.organization_name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhopal (AIIMS Bhopal)
basic_details.short_information: The All India Institute of Medical Sciences, Bhopal (AIIMS Bhopal) has officially announced the Group-A Non-Faculty Recruitment 2026 with 7 openings. The detailed notification was published on 13 May 2026 at AIIMS Bhopal Official Website. Candidates who meet the age criteria of generally 21 to 45 years and hold qualifications such as Degree with PG/Diploma in Public Relations/Corporate Communication/Journalism/Mass Communication, MD/MHA, MD/MS, Post Graduate Degree in Physics, or M.Sc. Nuclear Medicine Technology can now submit their offline applications up to 11 June 2026. Direct links to dow

qualification.education_qualification: Degree with PG/Diploma/ MD/MHA or MD/MS or MD, M.Sc.
qualification.details: Public Relation Officer: A Degree from a recognized University / institution with a Post-Graduation / Diploma in Public Relations / Corporate Communication / Journalism / Mass Communication with 10 years' experience in the field of Public Relations / Corporate Communication / Journalism/Mass Communication. Deputy Medical Superintendent: A recognized medical qualification included in I or II Schedule or Part II of the 3rd Schedule (other than the licentiate qualifications) to the Indian Medical Council Act 1956. MD (Hospital Administration) / MHA recognized by Medical Council of India. Or MD/MS in any clinical specialty with 3 years' experience in Hospital administration of a 200 bedded hospital. Blood Transfusion Officer: A recognized medical qualification included in I or II Schedule or Part II of the 3rd Schedule (other than the licentiate qualifications) to the Indian Medical Council Act 1956. With 5 Years' Experience in Blood bank with component separator. OR M.D. in Blood Transfusion Medicine with 1 year experience in Blood Bank with component separator during the PG course. Medical Physicist (Department of Radiotherapy): Post Graduate Degree in Physics from a recognized University; A Post M.Sc. diploma in Radiological / Medical Physics from a recognized University; & An internship of minimum 12 months in a recognized well-equipped radiation therapy department. OR A basic degree in science from a recognized university, with Physics as one of the main subjects; A Post Graduate degree in radiological / medical physics from a recognized university; & An internship of minimum 12 months in a recognized well-equipped radiation therapy department. Medical Physicist (Department of Nuclear Medicine): M.Sc. Nuclear Medicine Technology from a recognized University/Institution, and RSO Level-II Certification recognized by AERB. Desirable: Ph. D. in Nuclear Medicine.

selection_process: Scrutiny of Application Interview Document Verification
how_to_apply: Read the official notification carefully before applying.
Download the application form from the official website: www.aiimsbhopal.edu.in.
Fill the application form carefully with correct information.
Attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and certificates.
Check all details carefully before submission.
Send the completed application form to the address mentioned in the notification through Speed Post / Registered Post or as instructed.
Ensure the application reaches before the last date: 11-06-2026.
Keep a photocopy of the submitted application form for future reference.

faq.question: Q1. What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026 is 11th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated authority by this date.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are available for Group-A Non-Faculty posts?
faq.answer: There are a total of 7 vacancies for Group-A Non-Faculty posts announced by AIIMS Bhopal in this recruitment drive.

faq.question: Q3. What is the application mode for this recruitment?
faq.answer: The application mode for AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026 is offline. Candidates need to download the form and send it via post.

faq.question: Q4. What is the salary structure for the selected candidates?
faq.answer: The selected candidates will receive a salary in the pay scale of Level-10 to Level-11, as per the government norms.

faq.question: Q5. What are the educational qualifications required for the posts?
faq.answer: Educational qualifications vary by post and include degrees, PG diplomas, MD, MHA, M.Sc., and specific certifications. Please refer to the detailed notification for specific post requirements.

faq.question: Q6. Is there any application fee for SC/ST candidates?
faq.answer: No, there is no application fee for SC/ST candidates. The application fee is applicable only for General/OBC categories.

faq.question: Q7. What is the age limit for applying to these posts?
faq.answer: The age limit varies by post, generally ranging between 21 to 45 years. Age relaxation is applicable as per Government of India rules.

faq.question: Q8. What is the selection process for the AIIMS Bhopal Group-A posts?
faq.answer: The selection process typically involves scrutiny of applications, followed by an interview and document verification.

faq.question: Q9. Where can I download the application form?
faq.answer: The application form can be downloaded from the official website of AIIMS Bhopal, which is www.aiimsbhopal.edu.in.

faq.question: Q10. What documents are required to be submitted with the application form?
faq.answer: Candidates need to attach self-attested copies of required documents such as photograph, signature, ID proof, and relevant certificates as specified in the official notification.

faq.question: What is the last date to apply for AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: The last date to submit the application form for AIIMS Bhopal Recruitment 2026 is 11th June 2026. Ensure your application reaches the designated authority by this date.
